title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to design and build scalable web applications for our clients across diverse industries.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in web application development
Strong proficiency in React, Next.js, and Node.js
Experience with RESTful APIs and database design
Solid understanding of Git, code reviews, and Agile practices
Excellent problem-solving and communication skills

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Join our mobile team to build high-performance Android and iOS applications using modern cross-platform and native frameworks.
requirements: 3+ years of mobile development experience
Proficiency in React Native or Flutter
Experience publishing apps to major mobile app stores
Understanding of mobile UI/UX best practices
Ability to work independently in a Hybrid or Remote setup

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create intuitive, visually compelling user interfaces and experiences for web and mobile applications used by businesses across India.
requirements: 3+ years of UI/UX design experience
Proficiency in industry design tools and design systems
Portfolio demonstrating web and mobile design work
Understanding of accessibility and responsive design principles
Ability to collaborate closely with developers

title: QA Engineer
description: Ensure the quality and reliability of our software deliverables through systematic manual and automated testing processes.
requirements: 2+ years of software testing experience
Experience with test case design and bug tracking tools
Familiarity with API testing and basic automation frameworks
Attention to detail and analytical mindset
Good written communication for clear bug reports

title: .NET Developer
description: Develop and maintain Windows and enterprise applications using the .NET ecosystem for our corporate clients.
requirements: 4+ years of .NET development experience
Proficiency in C#, ASP.NET Core, and SQL Server
Experience with Windows desktop or enterprise web applications
Understanding of software design patterns
Ability to work on legacy modernisation projects

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and deployment processes that support our development teams and client projects.
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or infrastructure experience
Experience with cloud platform services
Proficiency in Docker, CI/CD tools, and scripting
Understanding of monitoring and logging solutions
Security-conscious approach to infrastructure management

title: Business Analyst
description: Bridge the gap between client business needs and technical solutions by gathering requirements, documenting specifications, and supporting project delivery.
requirements: 3+ years of business analysis experience in IT projects
Strong requirements gathering and documentation skills
Experience with Agile project environments
Ability to create user stories, wireframes, and process flows
Excellent stakeholder communication skills

title: Junior Software Developer
description: An excellent opportunity for a motivated developer to grow their skills while contributing to real client projects under senior mentorship.
requirements: 1+ years of software development experience or relevant internship
Knowledge of at least one programming language (JavaScript, Python, or C#)
Basic understanding of databases and web technologies
Eagerness to learn and accept feedback
Degree in Computer Science or related field preferred
